scripts.dev: node scripts/build-team-logos-webp.mjs && node scripts/fetch-league-if-needed.mjs && node scripts/copy-data.js && node scripts/build-waiver-gw-analytics.mjs && node scripts/build-draft-picks.mjs && vite
scripts.build: node scripts/build-team-logos-webp.mjs && node scripts/fetch-league-if-needed.mjs && node scripts/copy-data.js && node scripts/build-waiver-gw-analytics.mjs && node scripts/build-draft-picks.mjs && vite build && node scripts/write-deploy-check.mjs && node scripts/postbuild-gh-pages.mjs
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx gh-pages -d dist
